name: social-impact-accountability
description: Orchestrates notification of third parties (advertisers, regulators, and civil society) regarding confirmed misinformation to achieve social responsibility and blowback against malicious actors.

steps.name: identify-stakeholders
steps.prompt: For the following debunked claim: {{input}}, identify associated stakeholders including the hosting platform, major advertisers on that platform, and relevant regulatory bodies or fact-checking NGOs.

steps.name: draft-alerts
steps.prompt: Using the verified evidence from the debunking report, draft professional but firm 'Misinformation Alerts' tailored for each group in {{stakeholder_list}}. Highlight the breach of social responsibility and potential reputational blowback for associated brands.

steps.name: disseminate-reports
steps.prompt: Prepare the drafted alerts in {{drafted_alerts}} for dissemination. Format them as formal PDF reports or email drafts ready for delivery via the appropriate communication channels.
